channel.title: Cricetus Cricetus Ltd
channel.description: Cricetus Cricetus Publishing is a boutique press offering captivating fiction and insightful non-fiction, with a passion for creativity and discovery.

item.title: Missed Marvels: Why You Should Read Riccioli
item.description: Giovanni Battista Riccioli was a Polymath who was certainly a big talking point in the modern age. He was by all means the next successor...
